CronSchedule.description: A cron expression in standard 5-field format (e.g. "0 3 * * *").

DesiredCondition.description: A single desired state condition. The Asset is Ready only when all conditions are satisfied. Each condition carries a `name` that is unique within the Asset (after Conditions expansion) and used as a key in execution logs.

oneOf.description: Can transition to Not Ready as time passes beyond `maxAge`.

checkAt.description: Optional cron expression for additional evaluation at a specific time.

column.description: If omitted, freshness is determined from table metadata instead of a column value.

interval.description: Polling interval for re-evaluating this condition.

maxAge.description: Maximum acceptable age of the data before the condition becomes Not Ready.

name.description: Unique identifier for this condition within the Asset.

oneOf.description: Query must return a scalar boolean. Ready when the result is true.

interval.description: Optional polling interval. If omitted, only evaluated on upstream state change or after sync.

name.description: Unique identifier for this condition within the Asset.

query.description: SQL query that must return a scalar boolean.

oneOf.description: Runs an external command. Ready when the process exits with code 0. `run` is argv: the first element is the program, the rest are arguments.

interval.description: Optional polling interval. If omitted, only evaluated on upstream state change or after sync.

name.description: Unique identifier for this condition within the Asset.

run.description: Command and arguments in argv format.

description: Spec for `kind: Conditions`. A reusable set of conditions referenced from Asset `onDrift` entries.
title: ConditionsSpec
